rubric_metadata.name: Industry Baseline (ISO 27001 + SOC 2)
rubric_metadata.description: Security, governance, auditability, and operational control baseline aligned to ISO 27001 and SOC 2 principles.

dimensions.name: Parallel Governance Architecture
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Validate START->Detectives parallel fan-out, fan-in synchronization, Judges parallel fan-out, deterministic ChiefJustice.
dimensions.judicial_logic: Score 1 when linearized; score high only with explicit fan-out and fan-in wiring.

dimensions.name: Typed State and Reducer Safety
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Verify BaseModel schemas, TypedDict AgentState, Annotated reducers operator.add/operator.ior.
dimensions.judicial_logic: Cap at 2 if dict soup or overwrite risk is present.

dimensions.name: Security and Sandbox Controls
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Require tempfile, subprocess.run, return code validation, and explicit failure handling.
dimensions.judicial_logic: Security defects cap score to 3 regardless of other strengths.

dimensions.name: Traceability and Evidence Integrity
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Cross-reference claims against repository paths and collected evidence channels.
dimensions.judicial_logic: Defense claims without cited evidence must be downgraded.

dimensions.name: Deterministic Arbitration
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Confirm ChiefJustice is pure Python and enforces override/variance/dissent rules.
dimensions.judicial_logic: Any LLM-based final synthesis is non-compliant.
